title: Rotom Appliances [Cobblemon]
description: Felt bad because your beloved rotom is in the game but not obtainable neither able to change forms? - Well no more!
body:
![Rotom Appliances](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eacff4ec5c604b580a79e98182bd9e1198e28c1_0.webp)

## This is the datapack version of Rotom Appliances
Since the Rotoms files already in Cobblemon 1.6 are unusable, this aims to add Rotom and its forms to the game, with form changes, spawns and some the animations of the official cobblemon team!

If you wan't a more immersive way of changing its forms, check out the [Mod Version](https://modrinth.com/mod/appliances), it adds 5 new minecraft themed blocks for Rotom to possess and you to right-click to change forms!


## Want even more?
This mod is fully compatible with AllTheMons, Mega Showdown & [MissingMons v3.4+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon), which adds many custom animations to each appliance, go and check it out if you haven't already! 

## How to install:

1. Download the right file for your Cobblemon version! _(1.6c = 1.6+, 1.5 = 1.5,)_
2. Add this pack to your resourcepacks `\resourcepacks`
3. Add this pack to your **worlds** datapack `\saves\[YOURWORLDNAME]\datapacks`
4. Enable the resourcepack ingame `ESC - Options - Resource Packs`

## How to switch forms?
- Right-click Rotom with a `Data Monitor`, so it can freely switch forms _(or switch back to his bulb form if he already has a form)_!
 
## Where does he spawn?
- In [Woodland Mansions](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Woodland_Mansion) _(uncommon)_
- in Ancient Cities in the [Redstone Room](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Ancient_City#Redstone_circuits) _(uncommon)_
- On Beaches _(ultra-rare but you'll find plenty when its thundering!)_
- Near* Cobblemon Tech _(PCs, Healers, Fossil Analyzers, Restoration Tanks, Data Monitors)_ _(rare)_
- Near* Redstone components! _(Blocks, Torches, Ores, Lamps, Repeaters, Comparators, Daylight Detectors, Lightning Rods)_ _(rare)_

*near meaning a 9x5x9 area around said block

## Frequently asked questions (FAQ) & Support link:


<details>
<summary>Click to unfold</summary>
  
### I have a question about the frequently asked questions!
- Join the [cobblemon discord](https://discord.com/invite/cobblemon), and pay me a visit [here](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1340530002185158767)!

### Is this compatible with the `<NAME>` addon?
- This is compatible with **every** addon, as long as it does **not** add Rotom, like SaltMons! (except MissingMons, that's specifically made to be compatible)

### Does this work for Fabric/Forge/NeoForge?
- This is a datapack/resourcepack, not a mod (.jar)
- So you can use this with whatever modlauncher you prefer 

### He's not showing on my Pokenav or when I do a /checkspawn!
- Make sure you tried in different positions **on the ground** or near **spawnable area**
- Make sure you checked the correct bucket
- Make sure you meet **all** requirements _(biome, structure, blocks etc.)_
- make sure you **correctly** installed the datapack

### Can I use this on my server?
- Private servers? - Go catch 'em all!
- Public servers? - As long as you comply with the provided license

## What does the CC BY-NC 4.0 license allow?
### You are free to, but not limited to:
- create forks,
- create addons, 
- use this on servers, 
### **Only** as long as you follow those rules: 
- You **must** give appropriate credit to this
  - _be it a link, mention of this packs name + creator - you'll find a way!_
  - _don't claim you made this_ :(
- You **cannot** make money 
  - _no paid servers/microtransactions_

</details>
